objective: Enforce one active practice and one active mock_exam per user and paper through database partial uniqueness plus one transactionally serialized create-or-return-existing claim, preserving exact authorization lineage and returning the authoritative existing progress under concurrent starts.
blockedFiles: all dependency and configuration files outside allowedFiles
all authorization, quota, Provider, secret/env, deployment, PR and force-push surfaces outside allowedFiles

preRedImpactScan.authoritativeChain: practice/mock_exam start route -> start validator -> service paper and exact authorization selection -> repository transaction -> authorization lineage lock -> deterministic user/paper session-start advisory lock -> active-row recheck -> create-or-return-existing -> partial unique index -> authoritative progress response
preRedImpactScan.bundleDisposition: F-0013 remains runtime_hold; F-0026 is a separate confirmed root cause; F-0027 remains separate because answer mutation/scoring atomicity has a different command boundary and validation matrix
preRedImpactScan.currentMasterEvidence: the legacy in-process practice promise map cannot protect multiple processes; mock_exam has no equivalent guard; both repository create paths still insert after an out-of-transaction active lookup; neither table has an active user-paper partial unique index
preRedImpactScan.permissionSemantics: unchanged; the task preserves F-0008 exact authorization lineage and never substitutes authorization sources

activeSessionClaimContract.databaseInvariant: at most one practice row with practice_status=in_progress and at most one mock_exam row with exam_status=in_progress for the same user_id and paper_id
activeSessionClaimContract.transaction: after the existing organization authorization serialization boundary, each start transaction acquires one deterministic mode+user+paper advisory lock, rechecks all active rows under the lock, validates exact authorization and published paper facts, and either inserts once or returns the single authoritative existing row
activeSessionClaimContract.corruption: more than one pre-existing active row or an identity/authorization conflict fails closed; no arbitrary first-row selection or silent repair
activeSessionClaimContract.concurrentReplay: all concurrent callers converge on one publicId; the loser does not create a deadline task or second session and receives existing answer progress instead of an empty synthetic response
activeSessionClaimContract.authorization: an existing lineaged session may be resumed only under its exact authorization source/publicId; legacy all-null behavior remains compatible and no lineage is rewritten
activeSessionClaimContract.snapshot: a stale or incompatible existing snapshot is handled by the existing explicit expire/terminate-and-restart rules under the same claim boundary, never by creating a second active row
activeSessionClaimContract.migration: only two additive partial unique indexes and coherent Drizzle snapshot/journal metadata; no backfill, data mutation, destructive DDL or migration apply

acceptance: two concurrent practice starts across independent service instances converge on one active practice and one publicId
two concurrent mock_exam starts converge on one active mock_exam and exactly one deadline task
database partial unique indexes independently reject a second active row while allowing historical completed, expired or terminated rows
same user with different papers and different users with the same paper do not contend semantically
same-scope requests with different explicit authorization lineage fail closed rather than switching or rewriting the active session
pre-existing duplicate active rows fail closed without choosing one or mutating data
existing authoritative answer progress is returned for a concurrent replay and is not replaced with an empty response
F-0008 exact-lineage creation and cancellation regressions remain GREEN
migration source is additive only and is not applied; no real database proof is claimed
no permission, entitlement, quota, Provider, dependency, mechanism or external boundary changes

validationCommands.name: active-answer-session-claim-schema-source

requestedOperations: additive schema and migration source without apply
database application transaction and concurrency logic

validationEvidence.databaseRuntime: not executed; proof is static and synthetic only

conclusions: authorization serialization lock is acquired before the namespaced mode-user-paper claim lock
claim transactions re-read every active row and reject duplicate or incompatible authoritative state
practice and mock_exam are separated in the lock identity and partial unique indexes
exact F-0008 lineage is preserved while coherent legacy all-null lineage remains read-compatible
stale snapshot replacement, mock deadline cancellation and fresh creation share one claim transaction
repository replay returns authoritative answer progress and never synthesizes an empty concurrent response
migration contains no data mutation, destructive DDL, backfill or apply
